parameters.query: ={{ (() => { const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; const chats = [s.customer_chat_id, s.empty_chat_id, s.cancel_chat_id].map(v => String(v || '').replace(/'/g, "''")).join(', '); const milkSku = String(s.milk_sku || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const attaSku = String(s.atta_sku || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `DELETE FROM public.order_feedback WHERE chat_id::text IN ('${String(s.customer_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}', '${String(s.empty_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}', '${String(s.cancel_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}'); DELETE FROM public.pending_orders WHERE chat_id IN (${chats}); DELETE FROM public.order_summary WHERE chat_id IN (${chats}); DELETE FROM public.orders WHERE user_id IN (${chats}); DELETE FROM public.cart_items WHERE cart_id IN (SELECT cart_id FROM public.carts WHERE user_id IN (${chats})); DELETE FROM public.carts WHERE user_id IN (${chats}); DELETE FROM public.inventory WHERE sku IN ('${milkSku}', '${attaSku}'); SELECT 'cleanup' AS result;`; })() }}
SELECT store_id, store_name FROM public.stores ORDER BY COALESCE(onboarding_step, 0) DESC, created_at DESC NULLS LAST, store_id DESC LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode: const row = $('Resolve Store').first().json || {}; if (!row.store_id) throw new Error('No active store available for linked proof'); return [{ json: row }];

parameters.query: ={{ (() => { const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; const store = $('Ensure Store Ready').first().json || {}; const milkName = String(s.milk_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const milkSku = String(s.milk_sku || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const attaName = String(s.atta_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const attaSku = String(s.atta_sku || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const storeId = Number(store.store_id || 0); return `INSERT INTO public.inventory (item_name, sku, price, stock, unit, category, store_id, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('${milkName}', '${milkSku}', ${Number(s.milk_initial_price || 0)}, ${Number(s.milk_initial_stock || 0)}, 'pack', 'Dairy', ${storeId}, true, NOW(), NOW()), ('${attaName}', '${attaSku}', ${Number(s.atta_initial_price || 0)}, ${Number(s.atta_initial_stock || 0)}, 'pack', 'Staples', ${storeId}, true, NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (sku) DO UPDATE SET item_name = EXCLUDED.item_name, price = EXCLUDED.price, stock = EXCLUDED.stock, unit = EXCLUDED.unit, category = EXCLUDED.category, store_id = EXCLUDED.store_id, is_active = true, updated_at = NOW(); SELECT sku, item_name, price::text AS price, stock::text AS stock FROM public.inventory WHERE sku IN ('${milkSku}', '${attaSku}') ORDER BY sku;`; })() }}

parameters.jsCode: const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.customer_chat_id, user_query: 'browse', entry_point: 'linked_proof' } } }];
const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.empty_chat_id, address: s.address } } }];
const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.empty_chat_id, test_mode: true } } }];

parameters.query: ={{ (() => { const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; const milkSku = String(s.milk_sku || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `UPDATE public.inventory SET stock = ${Number(s.low_stock || 0)}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE sku = '${milkSku}'; SELECT sku, stock::text AS stock FROM public.inventory WHERE sku = '${milkSku}' LIMIT 1;`; })() }}

parameters.jsCode: const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.customer_chat_id, product_name: s.milk_name, quantity: s.order_qty } } }];

parameters.query: ={{ (() => { const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; const customer = String(s.customer_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `SELECT COUNT(*)::text AS cart_row_count FROM public.cart_items ci JOIN public.carts c ON ci.cart_id = c.cart_id WHERE c.user_id = ${customer} AND c.status = 'active';`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; const milkSku = String(s.milk_sku || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `UPDATE public.inventory SET price = ${Number(s.updated_milk_price || 0)}, stock = ${Number(s.replenished_stock || 0)}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE sku = '${milkSku}'; SELECT sku, price::text AS price, stock::text AS stock FROM public.inventory WHERE sku = '${milkSku}' LIMIT 1;`; })() }}

parameters.jsCode: const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.customer_chat_id, product_name: s.milk_name, quantity: s.order_qty } } }];
const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.customer_chat_id } } }];

parameters.query: ={{ (() => { const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; const customer = String(s.customer_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `SELECT ci.quantity::text AS quantity, COALESCE(ci.price_at_addition, 0)::text AS price_at_addition, COALESCE((ci.quantity * ci.price_at_addition), 0)::text AS line_total, COALESCE(ci.sku, '') AS sku FROM public.cart_items ci JOIN public.carts c ON ci.cart_id = c.cart_id WHERE c.user_id = ${customer} AND c.status = 'active' ORDER BY ci.added_at DESC LIMIT 1;`; })() }}

parameters.jsCode: const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.customer_chat_id, address: s.address } } }];

parameters.query: ={{ (() => { const orderId = String(($('Run Place Order').first().json || {}).order_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `SELECT order_id, status, COALESCE(final_order_total, 0)::text AS final_order_total, COALESCE(order_details_json->'items_in_final_order'->0->>'original_name', '') AS item_name, COALESCE(order_details_json->'items_in_final_order'->0->>'quantity', '') AS quantity, COALESCE(order_details_json->'items_in_final_order'->0->>'unit_price', '') AS unit_price, COALESCE(order_details_json->'items_in_final_order'->0->>'line_total', '') AS line_total FROM public.pending_orders WHERE order_id = '${orderId}' LIMIT 1;`; })() }}

parameters.jsCode: const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.customer_chat_id, test_mode: true } } }];

parameters.query: ={{ (() => { const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; const orderId = String(($('Run Place Order').first().json || {}).order_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const milkSku = String(s.milk_sku || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const customer = String(s.customer_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `SELECT 'pending' AS kind, COALESCE(status, '') AS val1, order_id AS val2, '' AS val3 FROM public.pending_orders WHERE order_id = '${orderId}' UNION ALL SELECT 'order_summary' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS val1, '${orderId}' AS val2, '' AS val3 FROM public.order_summary WHERE order_id = '${orderId}' UNION ALL SELECT 'orders' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS val1, '${orderId}' AS val2, '' AS val3 FROM public.orders WHERE order_id = '${orderId}' UNION ALL SELECT 'inventory_stock' AS kind, COALESCE(stock, 0)::text AS val1, sku AS val2, '' AS val3 FROM public.inventory WHERE sku = '${milkSku}' UNION ALL SELECT 'active_cart' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS val1, '${customer}' AS val2, '' AS val3 FROM public.carts WHERE user_id = ${customer} AND status = 'active';`; })() }}

parameters.jsCode: const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; return [{ json: { tool_input: { chat_id: s.customer_chat_id } } }];

const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; const orderId = ($('Run Place Order').first().json || {}).order_id || ''; return [{ json: { action: 'accept', order_id: orderId, customer_chat_id: s.customer_chat_id, chat_id: s.owner_chat_id, test_mode: true } }];

parameters.query: ={{ (() => { const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; const cancelChat = String(s.cancel_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `SELECT 'pending_active' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS value FROM public.pending_orders WHERE chat_id = ${cancelChat} AND status IN ('awaiting_confirmation', 'processing', 'confirmed', 'dispatched') UNION ALL SELECT 'active_cart' AS kind, COUNT(*)::text AS value FROM public.carts WHERE user_id = ${cancelChat} AND status = 'active';`; })() }}

={{ (() => { const s = $('Seed Linked Inputs').first().json || {}; const chats = [s.customer_chat_id, s.empty_chat_id, s.cancel_chat_id].map(v => String(v || '').replace(/'/g, "''")).join(', '); const milkSku = String(s.milk_sku || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const attaSku = String(s.atta_sku || '').replace(/'/g, "''"); return `DELETE FROM public.order_feedback WHERE chat_id::text IN ('${String(s.customer_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}', '${String(s.empty_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}', '${String(s.cancel_chat_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}'); DELETE FROM public.pending_orders WHERE chat_id IN (${chats}); DELETE FROM public.order_summary WHERE chat_id IN (${chats}); DELETE FROM public.orders WHERE user_id IN (${chats}); DELETE FROM public.cart_items WHERE cart_id IN (SELECT cart_id FROM public.carts WHERE user_id IN (${chats})); DELETE FROM public.carts WHERE user_id IN (${chats}); DELETE FROM public.inventory WHERE sku IN ('${milkSku}', '${attaSku}'); SELECT 'cleanup_complete' AS result;`; })() }}
